post_locality_reduced: bound state remains minimized after successful authoritative binding

direct_post_consequence: bound sessions now retain less local state after POST succeeds
snapshot/state/diagnostics only read unbound local sessions when explicit compatibility fallback is requested
remaining_required_registration_reason: session must remain discoverable for explicit compatibility fallback before and after first turn
persistence/e2e residue still proves local bootstrap semantics
still_blocking: POST bootstrap still registers a local session
explicit fallback and persistence/e2e residue still use the store
POST still requires local bootstrap before authoritative binding exists
